speaker: Ruairí
lines: Never thought I'd fight beside an Orangeman.
Aye well, needs must. Their tanks don't check your chapel.

speaker: Davy
lines: Door comes down the same whether God's a Prod or not.

speaker: Ruairí
lines: You took a round meant for me back there, Davy.
Don't make it weird. Two streets left, then we never speak again.

speaker: Davy
lines: When this is done, the peelers'll want the both of us.
Then we'll boot them out an' all. One door at a time.
